command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 bash << 'REMOTE'
LF="/tmp/openclaw/openclaw-2026-06-10.log"
echo "=== What were the actual messages that got no-mention? ==="
grep -B2 '"reason":"no-mention"' "$LF" 2>/dev/null | grep -oE '"text":"[^"]*"|"message":"[^"]{0,100}"' | tail -10

echo ""
echo "=== Find the mention-detection text/body around no-mention skips ==="
grep -A3 -B3 "no-mention" "$LF" 2>/dev/null | grep -oE '"body":"[^"]*"|"text":"[^"]*"|"caption":"[^"]*"' | tail -10

echo ""
echo "=== Does Remy know its own @username for matching? Check mention config ==="
python3 -c "
import json
d = json.load(open('/home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json'))
tg = d['channels']['telegram']
print('botToken set:', 'botToken' in tg)
# mentionPatterns or botUsername?
for k in ['mentionPatterns','botUsername','username','selfName','name','mentions']:
    if k in tg: print(f'{k}:', tg[k])
msgs = d.get('messages', {})
gc = msgs.get('groupChat', {}) if isinstance(msgs,dict) else {}
print('messages.groupChat.mentionPatterns:', gc.get('mentionPatterns'))
"

echo ""
echo "=== Agent identity / name Remy uses ==="
python3 -c "
import json
d = json.load(open('/home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json'))
ag = d.get('agents', {})
defaults = ag.get('defaults', {})
print('agent name:', defaults.get('name', defaults.get('identity', 'not set')))
"
REMOTE
